name: diff
description: Differentiate expr with respect to x. Optional n-th derivative.

name: integrate
description: Integrate expr with respect to x. With limits a,b for definite integral.

name: limit
description: Compute the limit of expr as x approaches val. Use plus/minus for one-sided limits.

name: taylor
description: Taylor series expansion of expr around x=a to order n.

name: sum
description: Sum expr for i from low to high.

name: product
description: Product of expr for i from low to high.

name: laplace
description: Laplace transform of expr from variable t to s.

name: ilt
description: Inverse Laplace transform of expr from variable s to t.

name: residue
description: Compute the residue of expr at z = z0.

name: changevar
description: Change of variable in an integral.

name: ldefint
description: Definite integration using Laplace transforms.

name: simpsum
description: Flag: when true, sum tries to produce a closed-form result.

name: gradef
description: Define the derivative of a function f.

name: depends
description: Declare that f depends on x for implicit differentiation.

name: desolve
description: Solve ordinary differential equations using Laplace transforms.

name: expand
description: Expand products and powers in expr.

name: factor
description: Factor expr over the integers.

name: subst
description: Substitute a for b in expr. Or apply multiple substitutions.

name: ev
description: Evaluate expr with specified flags or substitutions.

name: ratsimp
description: Simplify expr by putting over a common denominator and cancelling.

name: simplify
description: Apply general simplification heuristics to expr. Loads the simplify_sum package.

name: radcan
description: Simplify expr containing logs, exponentials, and radicals.

name: fullratsimp
description: Repeatedly apply ratsimp until expression stops changing.

name: trigsimp
description: Simplify trigonometric expressions using sin^2+cos^2=1.

name: trigexpand
description: Expand trig functions of sums and multiple angles.

name: trigreduce
description: Reduce products of trig functions to sums.

name: logcontract
description: Contract logarithmic expressions: log(a)+log(b) -> log(a*b).

name: logexpand
description: Flag controlling expansion of log(a*b) -> log(a)+log(b). Values: true, false, all, super.

name: rectform
description: Put complex expression into rectangular form a + b*%i.

name: polarform
description: Put complex expression into polar form r*exp(%i*theta).

name: solve
description: Solve equation(s) for variable(s). Returns list of solutions.

name: algsys
description: Solve a system of algebraic equations. More powerful than solve for some systems.

name: linsolve
description: Solve a system of linear equations.

name: find_root
description: Find a numerical root of expr in the interval [a, b].

name: ode2
description: Solve a first or second order ODE.

name: ic1
description: Apply initial condition to first-order ODE solution.

name: ic2
description: Apply initial conditions to second-order ODE solution.

name: eliminate
description: Eliminate variables from a system of equations.

name: assume
description: Declare assumptions about variables (e.g. x>0) for simplification.

name: forget
description: Remove a previously declared assumption.

name: matrix
description: Create a matrix from row lists.

name: determinant
description: Compute the determinant of matrix M.

name: invert
description: Compute the inverse of matrix M.

name: transpose
description: Transpose matrix M.

name: eigenvalues
description: Compute eigenvalues of matrix M. Returns [values, multiplicities].

name: eigenvectors
description: Compute eigenvectors and eigenvalues of matrix M.

name: rank
description: Compute the rank of matrix M.

name: adjoint
description: Compute the adjoint (classical adjugate) of matrix M.

name: mattrace
description: Compute the trace of matrix M (sum of diagonal elements).

name: charpoly
description: Compute the characteristic polynomial of matrix M in variable x.

name: echelon
description: Compute the echelon (row-reduced) form of matrix M.

name: ident
description: Create an n x n identity matrix.

name: zeromatrix
description: Create an m x n matrix of zeros.

name: plot2d
description: Plot one or more expressions in 2D.

name: plot3d
description: Plot an expression as a 3D surface.

name: draw2d
description: Create 2D plots using the draw package (more control than plot2d).

name: draw3d
description: Create 3D plots using the draw package.

name: contour_plot
description: Plot contour lines of a 2-variable expression.

name: sin
description: Sine function.

name: cos
description: Cosine function.

name: tan
description: Tangent function.

name: asin
description: Inverse sine (arcsin).

name: acos
description: Inverse cosine (arccos).

name: atan
description: Inverse tangent (arctan).

name: atan2
description: Two-argument arctangent, giving the angle of the point (x,y).

name: sinh
description: Hyperbolic sine.

name: cosh
description: Hyperbolic cosine.

name: gcd
description: Greatest common divisor of a and b.

name: lcm
description: Least common multiple of a and b.

name: primep
description: Test if n is prime. Returns true or false.

name: ifactors
description: Return the prime factorization of integer n as [[p1,e1],[p2,e2],...].

name: next_prime
description: Return the smallest prime greater than n.

name: prev_prime
description: Return the largest prime less than n.

name: mod
description: Remainder of a divided by b.

name: quotient
description: Integer quotient of a divided by b.

name: totient
description: Euler's totient function: count of integers <= n coprime to n.

name: coeff
description: Extract the coefficient of x^n in expr. Default n=1.

name: degree
description: Degree of polynomial poly in variable x.

name: divide
description: Polynomial division of p by q in variable x. Returns [quotient, remainder].

name: gfactor
description: Factor expr over the Gaussian integers (allowing complex factors).

name: remainder
description: Polynomial remainder of p divided by q in variable x.

name: resultant
description: Compute the resultant of polynomials p and q with respect to x.

name: ratexpand
description: Expand expr, putting it in canonical rational form.

name: hipow
description: Highest power of x in expr.

name: lopow
description: Lowest power of x in expr.

name: ratsubst
description: Rational substitution: substitute a for b in expr, treating expr as rational function.

name: powerseries
description: Power series expansion of expr around x=a.

name: niceindices
description: Rename indices in a power series to standard form.

name: nusum
description: Compute closed form of a summation using the Nu algorithm.

name: unsum
description: Indefinite summation (anti-difference): find F such that F(n+1)-F(n)=f(n).

name: binomial
description: Binomial coefficient: n choose k.

name: factorial
description: Factorial of n.

name: gamma
description: Gamma function. For positive integers, gamma(n) = (n-1)!.

name: beta
description: Beta function: B(a,b) = gamma(a)*gamma(b)/gamma(a+b).

name: permutations
description: Generate all permutations of a list.

name: block
description: Block with local variables. Returns value of last expression.

examples.input: block([s:0], for i:1 thru 10 do s:s+i, s)

name: if
signatures: if cond then expr1 else expr2
if cond then expr1 elseif cond2 then expr2 else expr3
description: Conditional expression.

examples.input: f(x) := if x>0 then sqrt(x) else 0

name: for
signatures: for i:start thru end do body
for i:start step s thru end do body
description: For loop. Can use step for non-unit increments.

examples.input: for i:0 step 2 thru 10 do print(i)

name: while
description: While loop.

examples.input: block([i:1], while i<10 do i:i*2, i)

name: print
description: Print expressions to the console.

name: display
description: Display labeled expressions (shows name = value).

name: define
description: Define a function. Unlike :=, this evaluates expr at definition time.

name: lambda
description: Create an anonymous function.

name: apply
description: Apply function f to a list of arguments.

name: map
description: Apply f to each element of list (or corresponding elements of lists).

name: makelist
description: Create a list by evaluating expr for each value of i.

name: create_list
description: Similar to makelist but with slightly different syntax.

name: describe
description: Show documentation for a Maxima function or variable.

name: example
description: Show usage examples for a Maxima function.

name: apropos
description: Search for Maxima functions/variables matching a string pattern.

name: kill
description: Remove a variable/function binding, or clear all bindings.

name: load
description: Load a Maxima package or file.

name: float
description: Convert exact numbers to floating point.

name: bfloat
description: Convert to arbitrary-precision floating point. Control precision with fpprec.

name: rationalize
description: Convert floating point numbers to exact rationals.

name: abs
description: Absolute value of x.

name: sqrt
description: Square root of x.

name: exp
description: Exponential function e^x.

name: log
description: Natural logarithm (base e).

name: numer
description: Flag: when true, mathematical functions evaluate to floats where possible.

name: radians
description: Maxima always uses radians for trigonometric functions.

name: realpart
description: Real part of a complex expression.

name: imagpart
description: Imaginary part of a complex expression.

name: cabs
description: Complex absolute value (modulus).

name: carg
description: Complex argument (angle/phase) of a complex number.

name: conjugate
description: Complex conjugate of expr.

name: signum
description: Sign function: -1, 0, or 1.

name: max
description: Maximum of arguments.

name: min
description: Minimum of arguments.

name: floor
description: Floor function: largest integer <= x.

name: ceiling
description: Ceiling function: smallest integer >= x.

name: round
description: Round x to the nearest integer.

name: random
description: Random integer from 0 to n-1 (if n is integer) or random float from 0 to n.

name: length
description: Number of elements in a list.

name: first
description: First element of a list.

name: last
description: Last element of a list.

name: rest
description: All but the first element (or first n elements) of a list.

name: append
description: Concatenate lists.

name: cons
description: Prepend an element to a list.

name: reverse
description: Reverse a list.

name: sort
description: Sort a list. Optional predicate for comparison.

name: lhs
description: Left-hand side of an equation.

name: rhs
description: Right-hand side of an equation.

name: string
description: Convert expression to a string.

name: concat
description: Concatenate atoms/strings into a new atom.

name: tex
description: Output expr in LaTeX format.

name: save
description: Save variables/functions to a file.

name: read
description: Read input from the user with a prompt.

name: lsum
description: Sum expr for i over elements of a list.

name: partfrac
description: Partial fraction decomposition of expr in variable x.

name: nroots
description: Number of real roots of polynomial in interval (low, high).

name: newton
description: Newton's method to find root of expr starting at x0 within tolerance eps.

name: facts
description: List current assumptions, optionally about variable x.

name: remvalue
description: Remove value binding from variable x.

name: reset
description: Reset all option variables to their default values.

name: ratcoef
description: Coefficient of x^n in expr, using rational canonical form.

name: flatten
description: Remove nested lists one level deep.

name: sublist
description: Filter list elements satisfying predicate pred.

name: unique
description: Remove duplicate elements from a list.

name: assoc
description: Look up key in association list. Returns value or default.

name: at
description: Evaluate expr at specific values. Often used with derivatives.

name: listp
description: Test if expr is a list.

name: matrixp
description: Test if expr is a matrix.

name: numberp
description: Test if expr is a number (integer or float).

name: integerp
description: Test if expr is an integer.

name: ratdisrep
description: Convert canonical rational expression (CRE) to general form.

name: rat
description: Convert expr to canonical rational expression (CRE) form.

name: num
description: Numerator of a rational expression.

name: denom
description: Denominator of a rational expression.

name: multthru
description: Distribute multiplication over addition without full expansion.

name: collectterms
description: Collect terms by powers of x.

name: xthru
description: Cancel common factors in sums of fractions.

name: combine
description: Combine fractions over a common denominator.
